name: safemesh-ai-monorepo
description: SafeMesh AI - Industrial Safety Intelligence Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:ai
scripts.install:ai: python -m venv ai-service/.venv && ai-service/.venv/Scripts/pip install -r ai-service/requirements.txt
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.bootstrap: npm run docker:db && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed && npm run data:generate && npm run ml:train && npm run rag:ingest && npm run evaluate
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:ai"
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:ai
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
